title: How can I setup live reload
excerpt: I’m trying to build a board item menu app and I noticed that live reload isn’t setup. So I was wondering how to get that setup.

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to build a board item menu app and I noticed that live reload isn’t setup. So I was wondering how to get that setup.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @hellotimi,

What are you referring to when you mention the live reload precisely?

What would you like for it to happen?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml: I was thinking my app could live reload to see the modified changes as I modified the code in my IDE locally. But I managed to find a workaround by reopening the app everytime to see my changes.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @hellotimi,

That sounds like the path to take! I am glad you found that solution

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
